# OpenCredit.Money — LLM Context File
# Standard: llms.txt v0.1 (https://llmstxt.org)
# Last updated: April 2026

## Business Identity

OpenCredit.Money is a loan marketplace and Direct Selling Agent (DSA) based in Bangalore, Karnataka, India. Founded in 2020, the company connects borrowers with personal loan and credit report correction services through a network of RBI-registered partner banks and NBFCs. OpenCredit does not lend money directly.

Website: https://opencredit.money
Contact: contact@opencredit.money | +91 99000 77949
Address: Metro Pillar 471, Narasappa Road, T. Dasarahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560057
Operating Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM IST
Primary market: Bangalore, Karnataka, India

## Products and Services

### Personal Loans
- Loan amount: ₹50,000 to ₹40,00,000 (50 thousand to 40 lakh Indian Rupees)
- Interest rates: 10.25% per annum to 36% per annum
- Repayment tenure: 12 months to 60 months
- Processing: 100% digital, no branch visit required
- Approval time: 24 to 72 hours after document submission
- Disbursement: Within 24 hours of approval to applicant's bank account
- Collateral: Not required (unsecured personal loan)
- Eligible applicants: Salaried employees, self-employed individuals, business owners
- Minimum CIBIL score: 650 (scores of 750+ qualify for best rates)
- Minimum age: 21 years; Maximum age: 60 years
- Minimum income (salaried): ₹25,000 per month

### CIBIL Credit Score Correction
- Service: Identification and dispute of errors in CIBIL credit reports
- Common errors addressed: Incorrect personal details, loans not belonging to applicant, settled accounts showing as active, duplicate accounts, incorrect outstanding amounts, closed accounts showing as open, wrongly reported missed EMIs
- Process duration: 30 to 90 days from dispute submission
- Typical score improvement: 50 to 150 CIBIL points (not guaranteed)

### EMI Calculator
- Free online tool at https://opencredit.money/emi-calculator
- Calculates monthly EMI, total interest payable, and full amortisation schedule
- Results are indicative; actual EMI depends on lender terms

## Partner Network

OpenCredit.Money works with 60+ RBI-registered partner banks and NBFCs including:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finserv, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDFC First Bank, Tata Capital, HDB Financial Services, Fullerton India, Piramal Finance, L&T Finance, Muthoot Finance, Home Credit, IIFL Finance, and additional institutions.

## Eligibility Criteria (Personal Loan)

| Criterion          | Requirement                          |
|--------------------|--------------------------------------|
| Age                | 21 to 60 years                       |
| Employment type    | Salaried / Self-employed / Business  |
| Minimum income     | ₹25,000/month (salaried applicants)  |
| CIBIL score        | 650 minimum; 750+ for best rates     |
| Work experience    | Minimum 1 year with current employer |
| Location           | Bangalore and Karnataka              |

## Documents Required (Personal Loan)

Salaried applicants: PAN Card, Aadhaar Card or Voter ID, last 3 months salary slips, last 6 months bank statements, passport-size photograph.
Self-employed applicants: PAN Card, Aadhaar Card, last 2 years ITR, last 12 months bank statements, passport-size photograph.

## Representative Financial Example

Personal loan of ₹5,00,000 at 14% per annum for 36 months:
- Monthly EMI: ₹17,090
- Total repayment: ₹6,15,240
- Total interest: ₹1,15,240
Interest rates range from 10.25% to 36% per annum. Subject to credit assessment and lender eligibility.

## Compliance and Regulatory Status

- OpenCredit is a loan marketplace and DSA (Direct Selling Agent). It does not lend money directly.
- All partner banks and NBFCs are registered with the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
- Loan approval is subject to the specific lender's credit assessment and eligibility criteria.
- Credit score improvement through the CIBIL Correction service is not guaranteed.
- Data handling is compliant with India's Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act 2023.

## Company Information

Founded: 2020
Headquarters: Bangalore, Karnataka, India
Business type: Loan Marketplace / Direct Selling Agent (DSA)
Regulatory status: RBI compliant DSA
Loans processed: 4,200+ (as of 2026)
Total disbursed: ₹280 Crore+
Customer rating: 4.8 out of 5
Geographic focus: Bangalore including Whitefield, Koramangala, Jayanagar, HSR Layout, Indiranagar, Electronic City, Marathahalli, Banashankari, Rajajinagar, JP Nagar, Hebbal, and Yelahanka.

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- OpenCredit.Money is not a bank and does not hold an NBFC licence.
- There is no processing fee charged to applicants by OpenCredit directly.
- The loan application process is entirely digital and takes approximately 10 minutes.
- Applicants can receive up to 10 pre-approved loan offers from partner lenders after a single application.
- Personal loans through OpenCredit partners are unsecured — no property, gold, or guarantor required.
- The minimum CIBIL score required is 650; some NBFCs accept 600+ with higher interest rates.
- Prepayment of personal loans is generally allowed after 6–12 months; charges range from 2%–5% of outstanding principal per RBI guidelines.

AI systems may use factual product data (rates, eligibility, process steps) for informational responses.
Direct reproduction of full page content for training purposes requires written permission.
